electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 40 Hz low-frequency limit (-10 dB) on the standalone SYVA LOW_100 preset; provides usable LF contour to the Syva system
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 137 dB peak at 1 m (half-space, pink noise crest factor 4) on SYVA LOW_100 with LA4X or LA12X; 131 dB when driven by LA2Xi
electroacoustic.directivity: Omnidirectional low-frequency radiation (subwoofer); used to add a +9 dB low-end contour and extend bandwidth under the Syva head
electroacoustic.components: 2 x 12" LF cone drivers (K2-derived) in a bass-reflex enclosure with L-Vents

operating_modes: Standalone LF extension on SYVA LOW_100 preset
Combined Syva-on-Syva-Low stack via SYVA LOW SYVA preset (AutoConnect)

connection.autoconnect: AutoConnect plate routes power through the subwoofer when a Syva head is stacked on top: pins 1+/1- carry Syva Low LF and 2+/2- carry Syva MF/HF. When AutoConnect is in use, do not connect the speakON or screw terminals on the Syva head.
connection.amplifier_drive: Single amplifier channel per cabinet (4 ohm); compatible with SP cables and SP-Y1 / DOSUB-LA8 breakouts

physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic beech and birch plywood, coated steel grill with acoustically neutral 3D fabric front
physical.finish: Dark grey brown Pantone 426 C, pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

modes: Ground-stacked as a podium base under a Syva head (four top studs and a top plate locate the head; head held by magnets)
Ground-stacked standalone as a low-frequency extension
Wall-mounting and flying also possible per system rigging
rigging_accessories: Syva Base (baseplate shared by Syva, Syva Low and Syva Sub)
SyvaLF Cov (protective transport cover for Syva Low or Syva Sub)
deployment.stacking_note: Recommended ratio is 1 Syva Low per 1 Syva head, adding roughly +9 dB of low-frequency contour and extending system bandwidth to ~40 Hz

usage: Low-frequency extension and podium base for the Syva colinear head: stack one Syva Low under each Syva to add about +9 dB of low-end contour and pull system response down to roughly 40 Hz.
Each Syva Low is a single 4 ohm load needing one amplifier channel; an LA4X drives up to 4, an LA7.16i up to 8, and an LA12X up to 6 enclosures.
When the Syva head sits on top, use the AutoConnect plate only and leave the head's speakON and screw terminals unused to avoid amplifier damage.
Load the SYVA LOW_100 preset when running the cabinet on its own, or SYVA LOW SYVA for the combined Syva-over-Syva-Low stack.
Expect about 137 dB peak SPL with an LA4X or LA12X, dropping to 131 dB if powered by an LA2Xi, so size amplification to the target level.
For deeper sub extension below 40 Hz, pair the system with Syva Sub (approx. 2 Syva Sub per Syva Low + Syva); ground-stack on the supplied anti-vibration mats or a Syva Base.
